Name: FE_TEXT_EFFECT_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the display configuration for various interface text and video.

Fields.Name: Menu Resource Type
Fields.Description: The text effect type to use for this text effect.

Fields.Name: Text ID: 1
Fields.Description: The first text ID to display. -1 for no text.

Fields.Name: Voice ID: 1
Fields.Description: The first voice ID to play. -1 for no voice.

Fields.Name: Text ID: 2
Fields.Description: The second text ID to display. -1 for no text.

Fields.Name: Text ID: 3
Fields.Description: The third text ID to display. -1 for no text.

Fields.Name: Display Slot
Fields.Description: The slot to display the text effect in.

Fields.Name: Enable Movie Skip
Fields.Description: If ON, the player can skip the movie playback.

Fields.Name: Enable Movie Loop
Fields.Description: If ON, the movie is played back in a loop.

Fields.Name: Movie ID
Fields.Description: The ID of the video to play. -1 for no video.

Fields.Name: Text ID: 4
Fields.Description: The fourth text ID to display. -1 for no text.
